sp_widget.name: Incentive User Profile
sp_widget.option_schema: [{"hint":"Display the current user in the teams widget","name":"show_current_user","section":"other","default_value":"false","label":"Show current user","type":"boolean"}]
sp_widget.template:
Incentive Statement

{{data.name}} ({{data.user_name}})

Email: {{data.email}}
Manager: {{data.manager}}
Title: {{data.title}}
Role: {{data.role}}

{{data.error}}
